summary: VitalFlow v3.0 Iteration 10 - All P0 features tested and verified. Backend: 19/19 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All UI tests passed. Features verified: (1) GestorDashboard sector filter dropdown with data-testid='setor-select' lists all sectors from API and filtering updates dashboard metrics, (2) Period filter buttons (7d, 30d, 6m) work correctly, (3) /api/dashboard/setores returns list of sectors with Gestor auth, (4) /api/dashboard/team-overview accepts setor query param and filters accordingly, (5) /api/wearables/sync returns 404 with 'Nenhum token salvo' when no tokens exist, (6) B2B hybrid add-employee converts personal accounts to corporate successfully, (7) Google Fit callback saves device with provider 'google_health_connect', (8) Login flow works for admin, (9) Add employee modal opens and can submit, (10) Export PDF button works, (11) Connection status indicator visible in navbar.

issues: Console warning: 'The width(-1) and height(-1) of chart should be greater than 0' - Recharts sizing issue on initial render, does not affect functionality

backend: GET /api/dashboard/setores returns list of sectors (requires Gestor auth)
POST /api/wearables/sync returns 404 with 'Nenhum token salvo' when no tokens
POST /api/dashboard/add-employee creates new employee with temp password
B2B Hybrid: POST /api/dashboard/add-employee converts personal to corporate account
frontend: Admin login with admin@vitalflow.com / Admin123!@# succeeds
Connection status indicator (bolinha) visible in navbar
Gestao button visible for Gestor users
GestorDashboard loads with 'Painel do Gestor' title
Sector dropdown lists all sectors: Todos os Setores, Administrativo, Geral, Logística, Operacional, RH, SAC, TI, Tecnologia
Clear filter button ('Limpar') appears when sector selected
Period filter 7d button present and works
Period filter 30d button present and works
Period filter 6m button present and works
Add Employee modal opens on click
Add Employee modal form fields work (nome, email, setor, cargo, nivel_acesso)
Export PDF button present and clickable

critical_code_review_comments: Sector filter dropdown properly fetches sectors from /api/dashboard/setores and filters team-overview
B2B hybrid logic correctly converts personal accounts to corporate when added by Gestor
Google Fit callback saves device with provider 'google_health_connect' matching frontend
Wearables sync endpoint correctly returns 404 when no tokens saved
Connection status indicator (bolinha) properly shows online/offline status
seed_data_creation: Created test personal user (personal_test_e07af9@gmail.com) to verify B2B hybrid conversion to corporate
context_for_next_testing_agent: VitalFlow v3.0 Iteration 10 - All P0 features verified. (1) GestorDashboard sector filter: dropdown with data-testid='setor-select' fetches sectors from /api/dashboard/setores and passes setor param to /api/dashboard/team-overview. Sectors available: Administrativo, Geral, Logística, Operacional, RH, SAC, TI, Tecnologia. (2) Period filter: buttons with data-testid='period-7d', 'period-30d', 'period-6m' filter data. (3) B2B Hybrid: /api/dashboard/add-employee converts personal accounts to corporate when added by Gestor (account_type changes from 'personal' to 'corporate', registered_by_rh=True). (4) Wearables sync: /api/wearables/sync returns 404 with 'Nenhum token salvo' when no Google Fit tokens exist. (5) Google Fit callback saves device with provider='google_health_connect' to match frontend. (6) Connection status indicator (bolinha) in navbar shows online/offline status.
